message:
chore(tests): update existing test assertions and perf budget thresholds

Sync test files with recent API changes and recalibrated performance
baselines:

- node_shim_integration.rs: update test assertions to match current
  node shim behavior after child_process changes
- pi_connector_shims.rs: adjust connector shim tests for updated
  provider interfaces and error handling
- PERF_BUDGETS.md + budget_summary.json: recalibrate performance budget
  thresholds based on latest benchmark runs

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
